sglang.title: fix(health): make health-check rid unique across tokenizer workers
sglang.author: whybeyoung
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Use os.getpid() in the health-check rid so concurrent /health_generate probes from multiple tokenizer workers (--tokenizer-worker-num > 1) cannot collide. A bare time.time() rid could repeat across worker processes, producing duplicate rids in one BatchTokenIDOutput and crashing the shared Detokeniz

sglang.title: Unify NVTX annotation helpers and split the enable gate per subsystem
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
SGLang had accumulated several ad-hoc ways to emit profiler spans:

nvtx_utils — NVTX ranges plus record_function, env-gated — used by the scheduler main loop.
batch_overlap/operations.py — its own near-identical record_function + NVTX context manager, gated by a separate SGLANG_OPERATION

sglang.title: Fix prefill delayer wait histograms always observing 0
sglang.author: kingjameschan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The sglang:prefill_delayer_wait_forward_passes and sglang:prefill_delayer_wait_seconds histograms increment their _count but their _sum (and every percentile) stays at 0 forever, regardless of how long the prefill delayer actually held prefills. The prefill_delayer_outcomes_total counter

sglang.title: numa: bind within allowed CPUs when affinity is already constrained
sglang.author: libertyeagle
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
What
When a process already has a constrained CPU affinity (e.g. a container cpuset
that reserves some cores), _is_numa_available() returned False, so NUMA
binding was skipped and the scheduler process ran unbound across all cores.
This makes binding still happen under that constraint: it computes t

sglang.title: [perf] reduce overhead of fill_ids list reconstruction and decref
sglang.author: Qiaolin-Yu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

avoid copying the fill_ids each time to reduce the overhead of reconstruction and decref in long context.

Speed Tests and Profiling

sglang.title: Eval accuracy gpqa aime25 mixins
sglang.author: Jiminator
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Reasoning benchmarks (GPQA, AIME25) in the accuracy-eval kit were graded by an in-repo regex extractor that mis-scores verbose, un-separated reasoning. This routes the kit's reasoning mixins through the sgl-eval Python API for robust grading (boxed/sympy + multiple-choice), and adds an op

sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Only lower existing scenario values; cases/fields without a stricter CI value are left unchanged.

sglang.title: fix(io_struct): index extra_key per sub-request in batched GenerateReqInput
sglang.author: HumphreySun98
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
GenerateReqInput.extra_key is typed Optional[Union[List[str], str]], but batch normalization did not normalize/expand it and __getitem__ passed extra_key=self.extra_key to every sub-request instead of indexing it (issue #26755).
A batched request with a per-request list crashes downstream

sglang.title: [diffusion] Resolve model_index.json Hub-first with local-cache fallback
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
maybe_download_model_index() (runtime/utils/hf_diffusers_utils.py) resolves a model's model_index.json to pick the pipeline class. For a remote repo it did:
hf_hub_download(repo_id=model_name_or_path, filename="model_index.json", local_dir=tmp_dir)
local_dir=tmp_dir forces a fresh network

Multi-GPU tests/benches under python/sglang/jit_kernel/ each reimplement

and TP-QKNorm test/bench files onto it, and fix

sglang.title: Enable spatial-shard VAE decode across GPUs
sglang.author: mickqian

Summary

Add a shared spatial-shard VAE decode path for lossless height sharding, halo exchange, and final gather.
Reuse the common path across Wan/Qwen-style video VAEs, diffusers-style 2D decoders, Flux2, Sana DC-AE, LTX, and Hunyuan VAE decode paths.
Add a dedicated decode process group over tp-s

sglang.title: [diffusion] feat: add --warmup-mode enum

Motivation
Two issues with diffusion server warmup config:


Confusing two-boolean surface. Warmup is a tri-state (off / request-based / server-based) encoded as two booleans (--warmup + --server-warmup) with an invalid combo that _adjust_warmup scrubs, and --server-warmup is the inverse of the code

sglang.author: mickqian

Scope (important)
This patches DiffusersPipeline._apply_torch_compile — the path used by the --backend diffusers fallback (and --backend auto when a model has no native SGLang pipeline). It does not change the native pipeline path (denoising.py:_maybe_enable_torch_compile), which is a separate findi

sglang.title: ci(docker): support layered overlay images in release-docker-dev
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
What does this PR do?
Adds an optional overlay build stage to release-docker-dev.yml. After the base dev image is built, you can layer extra Dockerfile lines on top — e.g. pin a package to a specific commit, or clone a repo and pip install -e . — without adding a dedicated Dockerfile.
New workflow_d

sglang.title: [Spec] Restore index_share_for_mtp_iteration in EAGLE V2 draft worker
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
index_share_for_mtp_iteration lets NSA/DSA models reuse the indexer topk_indices computed on the first EAGLE/MTP draft step across the remaining draft steps (only when speculative_eagle_topk == 1), instead of recomputing the indexer on every draft step. The indexer always runs against the

sglang.title: [Distributed] Guard torch symm mem all-reduce sizes
sglang.author: mmangkad
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Guard the in-place torch symmetric-memory all-reduce path with the same payload eligibility check used by the out-of-place path.
Make oversized or unsupported tensors fall back to regular distributed all-reduce instead of copying into the fixed symmetric-memory buffer.
Disable the torch sym

sglang.title: [router] Reconcile workers that registered without resolving model_ids
sglang.author: Kangyan-Zhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Problem
The experimental sgl-router registers a discovered worker on the Added event by fetching /server_info once (with a bounded internal retry). If that fetch fails, the worker is registered with empty model_ids.
This is reachable in production via a readiness/introspection race: the engine's K8s

sglang.title: feat: report multimodal (image/audio/video) token counts in usage.prompt_tokens_details
sglang.author: Zyann7
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Chat completions report only cached_tokens under usage.prompt_tokens_details, so there is no per-modality visibility into
how many prompt tokens an image / audio / video input consumed. This PR adds image_tokens / audio_tokens / video_tokens to the usage details.
Modifications

Add image_

sglang.title: [Bug Fix] Validate tokenizer-dependent features with skip_tokenizer_init
sglang.author: rllin
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
When skip_tokenizer_init=True, certain features that require a tokenizer cannot work:

stop (string-based): requires tokenizer.decode() to match output text
stop_regex: requires tokenizer.decode() to match output text
min_new_tokens: requires tokenizer.eos_token_id for penalization

Previous

sglang.title: Fix disaggregated decode load token accounting
sglang.author: weireweire
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Avoid double-counting disaggregated decode requests whose decode-side KV slots are already preallocated.
Keep decode request-count accounting unchanged for waiting, prealloc, transfer, and retracted queues.
Add unit coverage for decode vs. prefill num_total_tokens accounting.
This issue is

sglang.title: [Bugfix][DeepSeek-V4] Fix Spec V2 Draft Input ID Dtype for DP Collectives
sglang.author: DaZhUUU
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR fixes a DeepSeek-V4 hang issue with DP attention, EAGLE speculative decoding, and overlap scheduling.
In the overlap spec-v2 draft-extend path, batch_result.next_token_ids can be torch.int32 and is assigned to batch.input_ids. DeepSeek-V4 NextN can later consume batch.input_ids in

sglang.title: [quantization] NVFP4 MoE: split fused w13 gate/up global scales
sglang.author: prajjwal1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In an NVFP4 MoE layer the w13 GEMM fuses the gate (w1) and up (w3)
projections. Some checkpoints quantize the two halves with separate NVFP4 weight
global scales, stored as [num_experts, 2] (column 0 for gate, column 1 for up).
Today the fused-MoE path drops column 1: it keeps only the ga

sglang.title: [Diffusion] FLUX: fuse FeedForward GELU into up-proj GEMM (cublasLt epilogue)
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Use the shared linear_gelu_tanh helper (runtime/layers/fused_linear_act/gelu.py) in FLUX's FluxGELU and the single-stream proj_mlp+act_mlp path to fuse the up-projection GEMM with the tanh-GELU via the cublasLt GELU epilogue, removing a separate bandwidth-bound GELU kernel + the [tokens, 4*d

sglang.title: [diffusion] Persist torch.compile Inductor/Triton cache across restarts
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Problem
The diffusion runtime never configured a torch.compile cache dir, so Inductor used its ephemeral $TMPDIR/torchinductor_* default — wiped on every fresh container/pod, making each cold start recompile the DiT from scratch. The LLM runtime (srt) already persists its cache under SGLANG_CACHE_DI

sglang.title: [AMD] Skip eplb bookkeeping and topk remap when EPLB is not in use on mori-ep / HIP (#22985)
sglang.author: Duyi-Wang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
CC @billishyahao
Motivation
#22985 ([AMD] Support eplb for moriep) added EPLB support to the mori-ep / HIP path. Two of the added paths do not account for configurations where the EPLB machinery is not actually in use.
1. moriep recorder bookkeeping is not gated on the recorder being active
The mori

sglang.title: [Fix] Reduce power of two to constant time
sglang.author: JiangJiaWei1103
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Closes #28227
Power-of-two-choices is meant to be O(1). However, PowerOfTwoChoicesPolicy::select was O(n) in worker count: workers.iter().choose_multiple(&mut rng, 2) is reservoir sampling. The policy_select bench confirmed linear scaling: 53 ns at n=4 and 2.45 µs at n=256.
Modifications

vllm.title: [V1][Spec Decode] Add Dynamic SD
vllm.author: ekagra-ranjan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Why is Dynamic SD needed?
SD methods need to verify K tokens for each sequence during decoding. As BS increases, the effective BS becomes BS * K which increases the compute requirement during verification. When this BS*K goes beyond a critical BS then SD negatively impacts the TPOT. DSD helps by tun

vllm.title: [Bugfix][DCP] Fix illegal memory access in DCP a2a decode under full CUDA graphs
vllm.author: majunze2001
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
--dcp-comm-backend a2a crashes every worker with a CUDA illegal memory access on the first request when full CUDA graphs are enabled (cudagraph_mode=FULL_AND_PIECEWISE) for DCP4 when running model nvidia/Kimi-K2.5-NVFP4. The DCP a2a combine drew its all-to-all send/recv buffers from the shar

vllm.title: [XPU] Support int4 group_size=32 W4A16 MoE
vllm.author: mfylcek
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The XPU WNA16 fused-MoE expert backend (XPUExpertsWNA16) accepted only the catch-all int4 weight scale key kInt4Static (GroupShape(1, -1)). In the compressed-tensors WNA16 mapping, this catch-all key is assigned to every int4 symmetric scheme except group_size=32 — i.e. per-channel as well a

Purpose
This PR replaces w4a16 MoE GPTQ Triton kernel with custom FlyDSL w4a16 MoE kernel

weights are int 4-bit quantized
group_size==32
arch==gfx950 (currently limited to gfx950, as the MoE was tuned only for gfx950)
--moe-backend=flydsl
lora is disabled

targeting Kimi K2.5 INT4 model. The kernel

When vLLM runs inside a container (Docker / Kubernetes pod) with a memory
cgroup limit, the CPU worker still reads NUMA MemTotal from
/sys/devices/system/node/node*/meminfo, which reports host-wide
numbers and ignores the cgroup limit. As a result, gpu_memory_utilization
is applied to the ho

vllm.title: [Frontend] Add Streaming Parser Engine and new Qwen3 Parser

Purpose
Fixes #44873
Introduce a declarative, config-driven streaming parser engine that replaces hand-rolled per-model streaming logic with a shared state machine. The engine handles reasoning/content/tool-call transitions, incremental JSON argument extraction, and detokenizer hold-back recovery th

vllm.title: Fix included router missing path for `FastAPI >=0.137`
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
FastAPI just released 0.137 which stores lazy _IncludedRouter objects (BaseRoute subclasses with no .path) in app.routes. prometheus-fastapi-instrumentator (<=8.0.0) reads route.path unconditionally in _get_route_name, so every request raises AttributeError in the metrics middleware and the

vllm.title: [Bugfix][V1] Split V2 model-runner attention groups on num_heads_q
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The V2 model runner's init_attn_backend (vllm/v1/worker/gpu/attn_utils.py) keys
attention metadata-builder groups on (backend, kv_cache_spec) only. The V1 runner
(gpu_model_runner.initialize_attn_backend) additionally keys on per-rank
num_heads_q, with a comment explaining why: layers with d

vllm.title: [Model] Remove XverseForCausalLM
vllm.author: xianbaoqian
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
XverseForCausalLM has been a registry alias to LlamaForCausalLM since PR #10814 (Dec 2024) deleted the standalone xverse.py implementation. Per vllm-release telemetry over the last 6 months: 38 instances / 0.028 GPU-hours total. The arch is effectively unused.
Adds XverseForCausalLM to _PREVIOUSLY_S

vllm.title: [Feature][Frontend] Report multimodal token counts in usage.prompt_tokens_details
vllm.author: Sunt-ing
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
usage.prompt_tokens already includes the image / audio / video placeholder tokens, but clients cannot tell how many tokens each modality contributed. This adds image_tokens, audio_tokens and video_tokens to usage.prompt_tokens_details, following sgl-project/sglang#27122. audio_tokens mirrors

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Reject out-of-range temperature values in SamplingParams
vllm.author: panpan0000
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The Python frontend of SamplingParams._verify_args only checked the
lower bound of temperature (>= 0), so values like temperature=3
silently flowed through to the engine and produced a normal response.
The Rust frontend already enforces the OpenAI-spec range [0, 2] via
#[validate(range(min =

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Rust] Sync EngineCoreReadyResponse with the Python dataclass
vllm.author: wseaton
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The Rust EngineCoreReadyResponse had fallen three fields behind the Python dataclass: block_size (required) plus the optional kv_cache_size_tokens and kv_cache_max_concurrency. Registration is a field-keyed map, so a Rust engine encoding the response omits block_size and the Python frontend rejects

vllm.title: [Rust Frontend] Add external→internal request-id map for abort()
vllm.author: sahilsGit
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Adds abort() by external (user-supplied) request id to the Rust frontend's
Llm, TextLlm, and ChatLlm facades, mirroring Python AsyncLLM.abort().
This PR introduces InflightRequests, a
refcounted index of external_id → {internal_id → live_guard_count} that Llm
maintains across active streams.
